notes.en: Adds the Maze workspace for structured dual-Agent debate, including setup, transcript review, verdicts, and follow-up actions.
notes.zh-CN: 新增 Maze 双 Agent 结构化辩论工作区，支持会话配置、过程查看、裁决结论和后续动作。

en: Added the Maze workspace for dual-Agent debate.
Added Maze session setup with topic, stance, round count, and per-Agent role selection.
Added debate result handling for generated rounds, verdicts, and follow-up actions.
Added localized Maze navigation, empty states, action labels, and workspace copy.
Added dedicated Maze layout and styling for setup, transcript review, and result panels.
zh-CN: 新增 Maze 双 Agent 辩论工作区。
新增 Maze 会话配置，支持辩题、立场、回合数和双方 Agent 角色。
新增辩论结果处理，支持查看多轮发言、裁决结论和后续动作。
补充 Maze 多语言导航、空状态、操作文案和工作区说明。
新增 Maze 专属布局和样式，用于辩论设置、过程记录和结果面板。
